business_description: ArgusReach is a done-for-you outbound prospecting service for professional services firms. We build targeted lead lists, write personalized email sequences, and manage the full outreach process — from first contact to booked meeting. Our clients focus on closing deals while we fill their pipeline.
differentiator: We handle everything - sourcing, writing, sending, and managing replies. Most services hand you a list or a template and walk away. We run the full process under your name, so you only get involved when someone is ready to talk.
outcomes: A full calendar. Consistent meetings with qualified prospects every
target_titles: Physical Therapy clinics, pain management clinics, accounting or legal firms, wealth management firms.
value_prop: We handle your entire outbound prospecting so your team focuses on closing
voice_sample: Hi [First Name], I came across [Company] and wanted to reach out directly. We work with professional services firms to build a consistent pipeline of new client meetings through targeted outreach - handling everything from list building to managing replies. Most of our clients were relying on referrals alone before working with us. If adding 3-5 qualified conversations per month to your calendar sounds interesting, I'd love to show you how it works. Would a quick call this week make sense?
compliance_note: never discuss personal or financial or sensitive information. never discuss medical records never give advice.
